overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious modern penthouse in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring indoor water features, a glass ceiling, and a panoramic view of a futuristic cityscape. The camera moves steadily through the space, briefly tilting up to admire the glass roof before approaching the large window overlooking the city.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden pathway through the luxury penthouse, passing an indoor tree planter on the right

entered.detail: grid-patterned glass ceiling allowing bright sunlight to stream through and cast geometric shadows
long wooden plank pathway running through the center of the space between water features
calm reflective water feature running parallel to the walkway on the left side
calm reflective water feature running parallel to the walkway on the right side
large rectangular planter containing a manicured tree with lush green foliage
horizontal red neon light strips running along the upper left wall providing cyberpunk aesthetic
dark textured stone wall behind the tree planter with vertical surface details

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person walk through a luxurious cyberpunk penthouse interior. A grid-patterned glass ceiling casts geometric shadows on the central wooden walkway, while reflective water pools line both sides. A large potted tree sits to the right, and red neon accent lighting runs along the dark walls, creating a high-end futuristic atmosphere.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look directly at the glass ceiling and sky above

agents.ego_description: tilting head upward to examine the glass ceiling architecture and the bright sky visible through it

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to focus on the architectural glass ceiling grid, revealing the bright blue sky and sun above. The wooden walkway and water features fall away from view as the perspective shifts to emphasize the ceiling structure and the red neon strips along the distant walls.

events.description: camera tilts back down and approaches the large panoramic window revealing the futuristic cityscape

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large window at the end of the penthouse to view the sprawling futuristic cityscape beyond

entered.detail: calm reflective water feature visible again on the left side of the walkway
calm reflective water feature visible again on the right side of the walkway
large floor-to-ceiling glass window opening to the exterior city view
sprawling futuristic city with numerous towers and buildings visible through the window
glass and metal railing at the edge of the viewing deck overlooking the city
tall cylindrical industrial tower structure prominent in the distant city view

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts back down and continues forward toward a large panoramic window at the end of the penthouse. The view opens up to reveal a sprawling futuristic cityscape with towering industrial buildings in the distance. The wooden walkway leads to a metal railing at the viewing deck, with the glass ceiling still visible above and water features reflecting the light on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a luxurious cyberpunk penthouse that transitions from an intimate interior walk to a sweeping panoramic view of a futuristic city. It begins along a central wooden walkway flanked by reflective water pools and red neon accents, with a grid-patterned glass ceiling casting geometric shadows across the floor. As the camera tilts upward, the interior details fade to emphasize the architectural glass grid and the bright blue sky above. The perspective then shifts back down to continue forward, moving past a large potted tree toward the end of the hall. Finally, the scene opens up as the camera reaches a metal railing, revealing a sprawling industrial cityscape through a massive panoramic window.
